programme.title: The Glorious Pediatricians S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: The documentary captures the daily work of pediatricians and healthcare staff in major departments of Shenzhen Children's Hospital, including emergency pediatrics, cardiothoracic surgery, intensive care, neurosurgery, urology, orthopedics, endocrinology, and hematology oncology. It focuses on the common interactions between ordinary people and hospitals, using the life and work of pediatricians as a microcosm.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 23
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: Devil-in-Law - EP 17
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Jia Nan confidently declares to Xia Yun that Wen Li will admit to have feelings for him in two days' time.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 51
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhi-en sees through Yajun's ulterior motive for joining the company and presses him for the truth. Yajun admits that he wants revenge on Zhengmin and intends to make him suffer for it.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 52
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhi-en wants to talk to Zhengmin about Yajun, but Xu Enzhu keeps getting in the way. Then Yajun intentionally behaves intimately towards Zhi-en as he returns her hair clip, leading Zhengmin to misinterpret their relationship.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S9 - EP 12

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 29

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 10

programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.desc: Dafa is a spoiled, innocent boy. It turns out he has a crush on the campus hottie, Wini. While he's watching Wini, he accidentally bumps into Indah, who agrees to babysit Dafa on campus. After a while, a misunderstanding arises between Dafa and Indah, which ultimately leads to Indah leaving and no longer babysitting Dafa.

programme.title: Ilmu Padi Mbakku Makin Berisi Makin Jadian
programme.desc: Juli (Nabila Zavira) and Romi (Naufal Samudra) fight over a motorbike taxi to get to the office, where they both work. Juli works as a security guard, while Romi works as a cleaning service. However, the more they see each other, the more they bicker.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: HOT SHOT - EP 574
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 62
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Pesona Tompelmu Mengalihkan Duniaku
programme.desc: Afgan is a playboy who easily hurts women. He visits one girl after another, but despite warnings from his friends, Afgan still refuses. Then, suddenly, Afgan receives a curse, a mole on his face. He's cursed with the mole because he's hurt so many women.

programme.title: Perawat Cinta Cantiknya Gak Ada Obat
programme.desc: Dimas (Kenny Austin) has just been in a single-car accident that resulted in a broken leg. An ambulance arrives to help him, along with a nurse named Luna (Larasati Nugroho). At the hospital, Dimas's mother wants Luna to care for him until he recovers.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 62
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: GASPOL - EP 157
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 49
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: MAS CAR WASH TYDAK RAMAH BINTANG 1
programme.desc: Resna’s plan for revenge against Ranti who hit her brother in an accident takes an unexpected turn. Instead of getting even, she ends up falling for Didan, the charming owner of the carwash.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 198
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Main Api Jadi Main Hati Bestie
programme.desc: Tasya (Naomi Zaskia) is heartbroken when her boyfriend Bryan (Arya Vasco) posts a photo with another girl, Avril. Determined not to give up, Tasya travels to Jakarta with a bold plan to crash their engagement party.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 652
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 146
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Aura Duar Jadian yang Tertukar
programme.desc: Fadi (Aditya Zoni), the campus rebel, and Naura (Hafiza Devi), the campus sweetheart, are always at each other's throats. During a scuffle, they accidentally knock over a mystical statue that emits a strange light. The next morning, they wake up to a nightmare: they have swapped bodies and must live each other's lives.

programme.title: MAU HERAN TAPI DIA MANTAN
programme.desc: I wonder, they're already exes but why do they still think about it? Tiara and Putra actually love each other but are separated by her half-brother Putra who also likes Tiara even though it's not love but obsession, can't Tiara and Putra reunite?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 147

programme.title: Naura: Suara Dari Mas Kambing
programme.desc: Naura (Ina Marika) possesses a mysterious power: every 'curse' or vow she speaks comes true. However, she loses her supernatural gift the moment she falls in love with Satria (Rezca Syam), a humble goat herder.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 199
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 1
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Gak Bisa Yura, Soalnya Dia Cewek Misterius
programme.desc: Laras (Larasati Nugroho) and Wisnu (Kevin Hillers) are bitter enemies who can never see eye to eye. However, they are forced to unite when a greedy businessman named Dayat threatens to seize their village's ancestral land. Furious that Dayat's company has desecrated Wisnu’s ancestral graves and plans to destroy a beautiful local waterfall for development, the two rivals must team up to stop the land grab.

programme.title: Siti Ooo Som - EP 10
programme.desc: Program berbentuk permainan yang akan mempertandingkan dua kumpulan selebriti dalam pelbagai acara dan dihoskan oleh Dato' Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 7

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 24
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 1
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Kiah Pekasam - EP 11

programme.title: Company
programme.desc: Chandu and Mallik team up to form a gang that quickly earns a reputation. But as egos clash and trust fades, tension builds, leading to betrayal and the gang's downfall. Release Year: 2002 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Kya Meri Sonam Gupta Bewafa Hai
programme.desc: Sintoo, a dejected lover, pens down his feelings on a currency note which goes viral and triggers a chain of hilarious events. Will he overcome the heartbreak and find closure?

programme.title: Happy Hardy And Heer
programme.desc: Happy follows Heer to London, hoping to win her love. But things get complicated when Heer falls for Hardy, leaving Happy heartbroken and caught in a romantic mess. Release Year: 2020 Awards: 2021 Nominee Film Award - Best Actor in a Leading Role - Himesh Reshammiya

programme.title: English Vinglish
programme.desc: A shy housewife joins an English class to end her family's ridicule, slowly discovering confidence, self-respect, and the courage to claim her own voice. Release Year: 2012 Director: Gauri Shinde Awards: Zee Cine Awards- Best Debuting Director- Gauri Shinde , Stardust Awards- Best ActreSS in Drama- Sri Devi, NDTV Indian of the Year, IN- Entertainer of the Year- Sri Devi

programme.title: Mercury
programme.desc: Five friends accidentally kill a blind man. Soon, his ghost begins haunting them, turning their lives into a terrifying spiral of guilt, fear, and supernatural revenge they cannot escape.

programme.title: Pukar (1983)
programme.desc: In pre-independence Goa, revolutionaries fight Portuguese rule, but one fighter's son misinterprets a key event, growing up resenting the very heroes of the freedom struggle. Release Year: 1983 Director: Ramesh Behl

programme.title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
programme.desc: Vishwas dreams of stardom but is mistaken for an inspector by Kajal, and when her strict mother arrives, his double life explodes into hilarious confusion. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 5 nominations

programme.title: Raja Raja Chora
programme.desc: Bhaskar, a timid thief and Xerox worker, risks everything through an affair and a daring final heist, only to be trapped in chaos that flips his life upside down.

programme.title: Naseeb
programme.desc: A man wins a lottery and becomes wealthy, but his life becomes entangled in love, betrayal, and fate as relationships shift and greed takes over those around him. Release Year: 1981 Director: Manmohan Desai

programme.title: The Power
programme.desc: A trainee nurse starts her first day at the deserted East London Royal Infirmary, where she must confront her haunting past and battle a dark force bent on destruction. Release Year: 2021 Director: Mahesh Manjrekar

programme.title: Pukar (1983)
programme.desc: In pre-independence Goa, revolutionaries fight Portuguese rule, but one fighter's son misinterprets a key event, growing up resenting the very heroes of the freedom struggle. Release Year: 1983 Director: Ramesh Behl

programme.desc: Bhaskar, a timid thief and Xerox worker, risks everything through an affair and a daring final heist, only to be trapped in chaos that flips his life upside down.

programme.title: Qarib Qarib Singlle
programme.desc: Opposites Yogi and Jaya meet through a dating app, reliving past romances on a quirky journey that brings laughter, self-discovery, and a surprising chance to find real love. Release Year: 2017 Director: Tanuja Chandra Awards: 2018 Winner Popular AwardBest Female DebutParvathy Thiruvothu

programme.title: Om Jai Jagdish
programme.desc: Three brothers, struggling with personal issues, must unite to save their ancestral home from auction. Their journey brings laughter, tears, and the rediscovery of family bonds. Release Year: 2002 Director: Anupam Kher

programme.title: Krantiveer
programme.desc: An ordinary man is transformed by a fearless journalist's ideals and takes a stand against corruption and injustice, eventually becoming a voice for the oppressed. Release Year: 1994 Director: Mehul Kumar Awards: 1995 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Actor- Nana Patekar

programme.title: Mercury
programme.desc: Five friends accidentally kill a blind man. Soon, his ghost begins haunting them, turning their lives into a terrifying spiral of guilt, fear, and supernatural revenge they cannot escape.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: Chiranjeevi grows up in the company of his mom and aunts who dote on him. But he is ultimately frustrated at not finding a bride who would be approved by all of them.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiya 3
programme.desc: Critically acclaimed comedy about the relationship between a daughter (Deepika Padukone) and her aging father (Amitabh Bachchan), whose eccentricities drive everyone crazy.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Ludo
programme.desc: Fed up with her mundane existence, a housewife gets to relive the past while attending a school reunion.

programme.title: Aetbar
programme.desc: In the kingdom of Mahishmati, Shivudu falls in love with a fair maiden. While trying to woo her, he learns about the conflict-ridden past of his family and his true legacy.

programme.title: The Making Of Piku
programme.desc: After resigning from the presidential post of the Indian National Congress, Subhas plays an important role in India's freedom struggle during World War II.

programme.title: Mubarakan
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers who hated each other unite when they discover their bigamous father is in danger. They fight the villains to save him.

programme.title: Itni Si Baat
programme.desc: When all the family property is left to Bharat, his brother wants to kill him for the wealth. Bharat overhears this and plays along with a plan. He then returns as a dacoit to set things right.

programme.title: Atrangi Re
programme.desc: A woman rejects her arranged marriage, sparking a chaotic chase as she tries to escape the wedding, while the groom and his family try to catch her.

programme.title: Saajan Chale Sasural
programme.desc: A romantically inclined couple decide to get to know each other through letters without disclosing their identities.

programme.title: Ghulam
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: The Diplomat
programme.desc: Ratan steals diamonds for a gangster, Balram Singh, but after learning about the latter's evil intentions, he decides to keep them. Later, believing his family to be dead, Ratan goes on the run.

programme.title: Haseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

programme.title: Saala Khadoos
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: Maqsad
programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.title: Making Of Pk
programme.desc: A rich businessman disapproves of his son's passion for singing. This leads to friction between them, causing the boy to leave home. He adopts a new identity when he becomes a popular singer.

programme.title: Sherni
programme.desc: Three roommates are in search of true love. They each find a girl with whom they fall head over heels in love with. Now they just have to get the women to reciprocate

programme.title: Thamilarasan - EP 1

programme.title: Tuck Jagadish - EP 1

programme.title: Veetla Visesham - EP 1

programme.desc: Jeevanand moves to Ooty seeking inspiration for his script. Strange, eerie events tied to his past unfold, testing his courage and unraveling deep-seated mysteries of his life.

programme.title: echappees Belles - EP 25
programme.desc: Luxembourg, a little-known, authentic and inspiring country. At the heart of this rediscovery lie majestic forests, secret valleys, picturesque villages and a vibrant culture driven by an engaged, innovative population proud of its roots. Not to mention the discreet but central role of the Grand Ducal family.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 16
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 3
programme.desc: Danielle Mitterrand was hurt when the existence of Mazarine, Mitterrand's secret daughter, and her mother Anne Pingeot were made official. She left, fed up with her husband's secrets. At the highest level of government, emotions were running high. The President was once again faced with a crisis that was threatening his public image.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 4
programme.desc: His illness was worrying and weakening Francois Mitterrand just when he had to travel to Strasbourg for the French presidency of the European Union. He nevertheless found the strength to follow through on the path he had set for himself: to pass on his message to future generations and to reconcile his two families.

programme.title: Ma Vie, Ma Gueule
programme.desc: « I am 55 years old and I still don't know what my nature is. » Barberie Bichette, known as Barbie, is going through an existential crisis and piles up often comical misadventures. An intimate portrait of a woman in three acts, a comedy, a tragedy, an epiphany.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Les Noyaux Sans Cerises
programme.desc: Convinced that the jury of the Red Carpet Film Festival is corrupt, a director decides to rig the audience award vote with his producer, who has been ruined by the making of the film.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 5
programme.desc: Governor Sylvestre has been kidnapped by members of the FLA. A disappearance that has everyone worried. Caro Majeau presents the new ''bechrel'' to Hamelin and his team. Karine is furious, whilst the population is still suffering regular power cuts.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 6
programme.desc: Jessika Walsh reads the FLA manifesto live on national television. The whole population is aghast to learn of the kidnapping of Governor Sylvestre. Hamelin stands firm: he triggers the law that puts the country on a war footing!

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 7
programme.desc: Rivard has a meeting in his office with the members of the FLA. On the internet, a video showing Karine slapping Hamelin goes viral, just as the French president is visiting Quebec. Tension mounts between Hamelin and the latter...

programme.title: Movie - Iruttu
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mystery behind unnatural deaths after taking charge of his new post at a hill station.

programme.title: Movie - Sathurangam
programme.desc: Journalist Thirupati blows the lid from the sad conditions prevailing inside prisons. A corrupt jailer and a minister are sacked as a result. Shortly, his girlfriend is kidnapped by an unknown person.

programme.title: Movie - Kadavulukku Ore Kaditham
programme.desc: Thyagu, an honest lawyer, postpones his marriage so that he can help his brother have a good future. However, things take a turn when his brother becomes a doctor.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Fm
programme.desc: A radio jockey has a fan in the form of a girl who often sends song requests. Both fall in love talking over the phone. When it is time to meet face to face, the boy develops an inferiority complex.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Appu
programme.desc: Taxi driver Appu is haunted by his past when his sister was killed by a eunuch who was also a powerful pimp. While trying to find him, he comes across another girl who is about to meet with the same fate.

programme.title: Movie - Devar Veettu Ponnu
programme.desc: Devar abandons Meenakshi in a bid to fulfill his dying father's wish. Devar's brother kills her and the child, Shankari. She returns as a ghost to seek her revenge with the help of her sister, Savithri.

programme.title: Movie - Mouna Geethangal
programme.desc: A woman divorces her husband after she learns of his illicit affair. When she discovers that she is pregnant, she moves to a new town to start life afresh. Ten years later, they meet again.

programme.title: Movie - Subramaniyapuram
programme.desc: A group of friends often land in trouble but find support in an aspiring politician. When he traps them for a murder committed at his behest, they are left to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Movie - Raajiyam
programme.desc: Karthikeyan runs a secret agency. When he proves that the governor's son had killed his own wife, the leader gets angry and decides to seek revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Time
programme.desc: Srinivasa, who works as a painter, is engaged to Thulasi. Due to certain unfortunate events, his engagement breaks and he struggles to resolve the problems and marry her.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Kisu Kisu
programme.desc: Sriram and Indu are classmates who barely know each other. But Indu's stern father begins to suspect that the two are having an affair. Thus he makes his daughter's life miserable.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Solla Vandhen
programme.desc: Prabhu, a college student, falls in love with Sandhya. However, he faces complications when he finds out that she is two years his elder.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Sudhanthiram
programme.desc: Two brothers, who always look out for each other, start working for a gangster after their father's death. But both of them get into a conflict when the younger one decides to testify against the gangster for a murder he committed.

programme.title: Movie - Chandramouli
programme.desc: A woman loves both her sons equally, but her biological son hates his adopted brother. One day, they along with the other villagers are forced to evacuate, and the adopted son is separated from them. He grows up with an aim to find them.

programme.title: Movie - Cheran Pandian
programme.desc: Periya Gounder, who adheres to the caste system, ill-treats his stepbrother Chinna as his mother is from a lower caste. His life takes a turn when his daughter falls in love with Chinna's relative.

programme.title: Movie - Jodi
programme.desc: Kannan's father is against love marriage. Kannan loves Gayatri, whose father was once a great music critic. Both decide to win the hearts of each other's family and only marry with their consent.

programme.title: Movie - Lathi Charge
programme.desc: Police constable Muruganantham gets suspended after he laththi-charges Vella, a criminal and a notorious gangster's son. What happens when he faces their wrath of vengeance while trapped in a building with his son?

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 51
programme.desc: Ten years on from one of football's greatest sporting shocks, we revisit the extraordinary story of Leicester City's Premier League title-winning season. Through exclusive interviews with the key figures who lived it, we relive the unity, belief, and impossible run that stunned the football world in 2015-16.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW37 Bournemouth v Manchester City
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW37 Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: REVIEW - WED 20 MAY
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 37, as Newcastle welcome West Ham, Bournemouth take on Manchester City while Manchester United face Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 40
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 50
programme.desc: Andros Townsend reflects on a career shaped by both extraordinary highs and deeply personal challenges. Filmed in Thailand, where he has rediscovered his love for the game, Townsend looks back on a footballing journey that took him through some of England's biggest clubs, while navigating the pressures, setbacks and defining moments that tested him on and off the pitch.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 37
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 51
programme.desc: Ten years on from one of football's greatest sporting shocks, we revisit the extraordinary story of Leicester City's Premier League title-winning season. Through exclusive interviews with the key figures who lived it, we relive the unity, belief, and impossible run that stunned the football world in 2015-16.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 19
programme.desc: Still the only team in Premier League history to throw away a 12-point lead, Les Ferdinand tells the story of Newcastle's agonising Run-In, where Kevin Keegan's side were pipped to the title by Manchester United.

programme.title: REVIEW - WED 20 MAY
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 37, as Newcastle welcome West Ham, Bournemouth take on Manchester City while Manchester United face Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 40
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 1
programme.desc: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features part 2 of all the highlights from BodogFIGHT season two showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in St. Petersburg, Russia.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Berto vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undeafeated Andre Berto (25-0, 19 KOs) in his 4th defense of the WBC Welterweight Title as he takes on former WBO Champion Carlos 'El Indio' Quintana (27-2, 21 KOs) at the BankAtlantic Center in Sunrise, Florida, USA on April 10, 2010.

programme.title: Return to the Ring Rocky Gannon vs. Dominick Carter
programme.desc: Delivering the untold stories behind some of the most exciting fights in the sport, FIGHT SPORTS brings you 'Return to the Ring'. In this original documentary series, we sit with the participants from some of boxing's most interesting bouts, including the fighters, trainers, officials and promoters that contributed to each event.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams (I)
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the first encounter between Sergio Martinez and Paul Williams. The bout is closely contested throughout and was pegged as a Fight of the Year candidate for 2009.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From Tokyo, Ryogoku Kokugikan, Show 5 features Terunofuji, Mitakeumi, Shodai and Asanoyama.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, St. Petersburg hosts the season finale where we'll see the best Judo from some of the sport's biggest superstars. Plus, we speak with Academy Award winning actor Adrian Brody and get his impressions of attending his first big Judo event, and we follow 3 Georgian warriors who came to St.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we follow one of our martial artists as he goes through a grueling tournament and how he uses technology to help him prepare for it.

programme.title: WCCB Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features a look at how John Alessio, a MMA veteran of almost 20 years, prepares for an upcoming fight. Melvin Guillard summons his inner daredevil and jumps off the Stratosphere in Las Vegas, plus much more.

programme.title: WCK
programme.desc: K-1 World MAX returns from Tokyo, Japan, highlighted by the -70kg World Championship Tournament opening round, and two Championship bouts. Don't miss a stacked night of fights - K-1 World Max on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: Skidmark gets jealous when White Shadow and Turbo become best friends; the crew must race as a bobsled team against the favored Jamaican Chickens.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: The crew teams up with grasshoppers in a fight against devious picnic ants; Turbo goes to great lengths to make somebody on the internet like him.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing Is Here! S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: When Archibald accidentally becomes Wendi Powers’ camera operator, they team up to crack the story on Crackridge’s serial prankster. / While Archibald is babysitting, toddler Lola gets her hands on the Sizematron and accidentally bigifies herself to the size of a building!

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing Is Here! S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: When Archibald watches an asteroid make impact, he soon discovers that it was actually a spacecraft containing an alien. As the authorities close in, it’s up to Archibald to get the weary traveler back to his home planet. / When Archibald invites Bea’s extended family to visit, he makes a shocking discovery….Bea is a princess!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 66
programme.desc: Lucky and Bebe spend the weekend pretending to be besties when their fathers come for a family visit and reveal that they're old friends.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: While the team struggles to come to an agreement, Haggar’s motives to take the throne escalate to epic proportions

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When the townsfolk decorate the Harmony Harbor holiday tree but lose the treetop star, TZG secretly search for it in the yard of a notoriously scary house. / When it transpires the house is not-so-scary after all and belongs to shy inventor Dr. Greenlittle, TZG secretly leads her to the big Harmony Harbor sing-along so that she doesn't have to spend the holiday alone.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: Ichabeezer's granddaughter, Maisy, comes to visit so Laura Carrot teaches him how to be a grandpa/Motato's new favorite pet lobster goes missing

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Larry's a genius once he wears glasses, so Bob gets some too/Larry becomes a crossing guard but gets carried away with all the power

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Kelp writes a song about him and Scallop to perform at the unicorn show. But when it comes time, Scallop wants to keep the song "just for them", leaving Kelp to come up with anew act- and fast! / The kids all visit the magical musical plant greenhouse on Unicorn Land. They each pick a plant to take care of, and for Kelp it’s a sad, almost dead plant that he falls in love with.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But it turns out that someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the Royal Knighting Ceremony! It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Gabby receives a special nighttime delivery, unboxing a glow-in-the-dark train engine. However, she realizes that she's missing the other three train cars to complete the whole train. The Gabby Cats help Gabby build the other three glow-in-the-dark train cars by creating shapes through interactive/musical games. In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, DJ Catnip sings a song.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Aggro, Burple and Cutter are left alone in the roost to care for some dragon eggs, but a trio of tricky Slinkwings want those eggs for themselves.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Cutter gets a chance to be a "mom" when a newly hatched dragon bonds with him, and they'll both be needed to get the others out of a tangled mess.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Ian starts to sleepwalk around Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly guides him back to his own bed where he can continue sleeping safely. / When Felicia wants to run an obstacle course for the first time but is afraid she’ll embarrass herself, TZG secretly boosts her confidence by helping with practice.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Harper is missing an ingredient to make her Mom’s favorite dessert on Mother’s Day, Eden enlists the help of her fellow Dew Drops to do an emergency city-wide ingredient search! / When Marcus records a video of his inventions, Phoebe gets caught on camera and must erase the footage before Marcus sees, or her Dew Drop cover will be blown!

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: When Scooch is selected to present a cake on the hit show, Whatever it Cakes, Tag agrees to drive him to the studio in Chew York City. But getting there will be harder than they imagined. / Lady Lydia is hosting Haturday for her family this year but she can’t seem to find the feathers on her Haturday hat. Tag will help retrace her steps and Scooch will take care of the guests while they search.

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch attend a Howl-O-Ween costume party at the Big Bowl Diner, excited to get a taste of Wagnes’ famous Pupclairs. But when the lights go out and the treats go missing, it's up to Tag to solve the case. / Tag and Scooch are determined to throw a Howl-O-Ween party for their cat friends in Meowbuquerque, but they must get the dogs of Pawston to change their ways so they can make the celebration more cat-friendly.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy help out at all the different stores (Cakey's Bakery, Baby Box's Craft Emporium, Kitty Fairy's Flower Shoppe) to earn kitty coins and save up for a melodicat at the Grand Opening of DJ Catnip’s Music Store!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 2

programme.desc: Larry loses his only tooth so Madame Clueberry tries to help find it/Bob and Larry build a fishing boat but it leaks and Motato wants to overtake it

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.desc: The Rescue Riders have a "Dragon Day" to show their skills to a young fan, but Aggro skips it to hang out with her new fun -- but reckless -- friends.

programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

Tag convinces Mayor Sniffington to let Frank come to the party if he passes Leo's Road to Kindness.

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: It’s Show and Tell Day for the Race Cadets! Tag decides to talk about how she got the race flag tag on her collar, but realizes she doesn’t know the real story of how she got it. He can’t sleep without it! Tag, Grandmaw, and Grandpaw race off to the rocket launch to try and get it back to him.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 533
programme.desc: After a 69-year-old woman is found dead in her bathtub, a suspect leads Tulsa detectives on a high-speed chase that ends tragically.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 5

programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.desc: An argument erupts outside a Florida nightclub. One man is killed, and another is charged with murder. Was it a case of cold-blooded murder, or did he have to shoot to save his own life?

programme.desc: Growing up gay in the hyper-masculine Bayou was tough on Ronald Dominique. An inability to connect and a prison sexual assault would cement his decision to ultimately kill his first victim.

programme.desc: Sara and Russell are ready to escape the sweltering southern heat and start afresh in a charming fishing village along the East Coast. They're searching for the perfect home to embrace a coastal lifestyle.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 15
programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sauteed in oil.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 55
programme.desc: Rachael prepares panzanella, a bread salad with tomatoes, and serves it with spicy mussels.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 34
programme.desc: Remaining contestants tackle a Mystery Box challenge set by Nagi Maehashi. While the mega Mystery Box features the most ingredients ever, the cooks have just 30 minutes to pull off a winning dish.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 4
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to go back in time for a dining experience from a bygone era? In this episode, host Michael Yo transports viewers to a 1920s-style New York City speakeasy.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy drive to San Antonio to check out a foreclosure that a friend scored at auction. The house is a time capsule from the 1970s, complete with dirty shag carpet and a faulty HVAC system.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S3) - EP 70
programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: By day Emma is a good Amish girl, but by night she sneaks out with her friend and together they lead a double life. When she witnesses a murder while out, her life and community are thrown into peril.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl discovers her daughter Lauren is missing. Despite Cheryl's efforts to seek help from authorities and the media, her pleas are overshadowed by the attention given to the missing white girl's case.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 5
programme.desc: After a dreamy night on the train, the Earth-Cleaning Bros hit the road again, uplifted by Mongolia's stunning scenery. But suddenly, Seok-hoon asks the driver to stop. Why?

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Caputos are briefly all under the same roof for the first time in weeks. Theresa visits her cousins in Rehoboth Beach for an impromptu vacation in between tour stops.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 8
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the "ghost flip", a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 35
programme.desc: Australian Chef of the Year, Hugh Allen, is back in the MasterChef kitchen to set a pressure test with his 'Banksia Pod' dessert.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings together Southern and Indian flavours with her black-eyed pea biryani. She sautes the peas with vegetables, spices and coconut milk, then bakes it with rice.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea. With their daughter Sarah guiding them, they are ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 16
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a well-rounded meal of a French-cut rack of lamb, baked with Dijon mustard and seasoned breadcrumbs, and a side dish of brown and wild rice with porcini mushrooms and sauteed spinach.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 58
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to cook hot honey chicken, a simple and enjoyable dish made with seasoned chicken thighs, which she serves with charred corn on the cob.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: While in London, Theresa visits a hatmaker to dress for high tea, and is surprised when the hatmaker turns down a reading. At tea, Theresa conducts an emotional group reading.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A year following a group of lawyers as they sue the Department of Homeland Security and scramble to help free those arrested under Donald Trump's immigration policies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: Spanish in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: Natural Grandeur of the East Mini
Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 38 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring the Unknown World "Teshig, Mongolia" (R)
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world’s hidden secrets.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 102
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 39 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial "Radio Star" Ep. 31 (R)
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there’s no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there’s no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 103
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1653
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 43
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 500
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 84
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. programme.title: Only For Love - EP 29
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 10
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 6
programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Call Me By Fire 3 - EP 17
programme.desc: This season upholds the panoramic competition style of its predecessors, intensifying the competitive edge. The brothers' perseverance embodies the essence of male determination and charm.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 30
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: My Perfect Stranger - EP 14
programme.desc: The story depicts a strange and beautiful story of time travel between Yoon Hae Jun (Kim Dong Wook) who seeks the truth behind a murder case, and Baek Yoon Young (Jin Ki Joo) who wants to prevent the marriage of her parents while getting trapped in year 1987.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 454
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 19
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Kids' Lives Matter - EP 13
programme.desc: The story started 21 years ago where one surgery broke the relationship between pediatric surgeons Dr. Jonathan Hui (Kelvin Cheng) and Dr. Amos Fong (Kenneth Ma). They part ways after but were reunited in Princess Anne Hospital due to a special transplant surgery.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 1
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 3
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2811
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Don't You Know Life is a Journey?
programme.desc: Uncover the unique life stories of people from mainland China, Japan and other Asian regions, getting a closer look at their attitudes, choices, family, career, ideals and values.

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 19
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2215
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 23
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan abruptly faints, and Yat-yin adheres to medical ethics and performs first aid on her. Yi-ka tries to ask Tak-kiu for help, but Tak-kiu is not in Hong Kong and cannot be contacted. Yat-yin resorts to asking Ngai Hau-tong for help. Hau-tong buys the site, and the matter seems to be concluded.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 35
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 21

Kei-tsun hooks up with Tang Pui-man, who is the younger sister of a gangster called Tang Wai-nam, as he wants to facilitate a business collaboration between Wai-wan and Wai-nam.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 24
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan, Kai-shum and their chums team up to raise funds, causing Zodiac HK Hospital share price to plummet abnormally. Kai-shum’s funds are withheld by Wing-sing because Wing-sing does not want Yui-fai to be implicated due to market manipulation.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2216
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 4
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 888
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 31
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 32
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 20
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 22
programme.desc: Sa-kei suffers heavy losses as he wrongly believes the information provided by Shing Fung. But he does not know Moon-yuet is the culprit behind everything. Although Moon-yuet takes advantage of Shing Fung, but Shing Fung continues to help Wai-wan, causing out of favor Sa-kei to leave the Wong Chuek board of directors.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 889
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2216
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 21
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 25
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Heavy rain has caused serious car accidents, and many people are injured. Yat-yin, Kin-pong and other medical staff try their best to save the injured. They even perform emergency surgery under the difficult conditions at the scene. The activities are captured by reporters’ cameras.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 37
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 5
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 889
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 20
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 11
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 3
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 6
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 16
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 17
